channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-24 to 2026-07-30
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Fri 2026-07-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.9 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 5.9 sec, wind 6 kt NE, water 70°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft); period too short (5.9 sec); wind direction off (NE). Sun 2026-07-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 6 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNE). Mon 2026-07-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 3 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 00:21, 12:15. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Tue 2026-07-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 5 kt S, water 69°F. Low tide: 01:05, 13:01. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (S). Wed 2026-07-29: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 3 kt WSW, water 65°F. Low tide: 01:47, 13:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.0 ft). Thu 2026-07-30: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 3 kt WSW, water 65°F. Low tide: 02:27, 14:28. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Fri 2026-07-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.9 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 5.9 sec, wind 6 kt NE, water 70°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft); period too short (5.9 sec); wind direction off (NE).
  • Sun 2026-07-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 6 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNE).
  • Mon 2026-07-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 3 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 00:21, 12:15. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Tue 2026-07-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.8 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 5 kt S, water 69°F. Low tide: 01:05, 13:01. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.8 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (S).
  • Wed 2026-07-29: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 3 kt WSW, water 65°F. Low tide: 01:47, 13:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.0 ft).
  • Thu 2026-07-30: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 3 kt WSW, water 65°F. Low tide: 02:27, 14:28. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft).
